## Meeting Purpose

[Review sprint pipeline and discuss specific client opportunities (Ramp and Zapier focus).](https://fathom.video/share/sQPxLe3p5BiaMjqkEU-wjFPYdW6Pz3e7?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Ramp upsell requires clarification on scope, resources, and timeline; qualification call needed](https://fathom.video/share/sQPxLe3p5BiaMjqkEU-wjFPYdW6Pz3e7?tab=summary&timestamp=294.0)
  - [Zapier opportunity looks promising with Kirkland's involvement; scope seems manageable](https://fathom.video/share/sQPxLe3p5BiaMjqkEU-wjFPYdW6Pz3e7?tab=summary&timestamp=880.0)
  - [Need to carefully handle high-profile leads (e.g. Plus AI) while balancing workload and capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/sQPxLe3p5BiaMjqkEU-wjFPYdW6Pz3e7?tab=summary&timestamp=1174.0)
  - [Improved process needed for scoping programmatic use cases and qualifying complex opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/sQPxLe3p5BiaMjqkEU-wjFPYdW6Pz3e7?tab=summary&timestamp=1441.0)

## Topics

### Ramp Upsell Opportunity

  - [Ramp wants to create a website for their cashflow desk YouTube content](https://fathom.video/share/sQPxLe3p5BiaMjqkEU-wjFPYdW6Pz3e7?tab=summary&timestamp=301.0)
  - [Unclear scope: full website development vs. content strategy/creation](https://fathom.video/share/sQPxLe3p5BiaMjqkEU-wjFPYdW6Pz3e7?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
  - [Need to qualify exact requirements, available resources, and decision-makers](https://fathom.video/share/sQPxLe3p5BiaMjqkEU-wjFPYdW6Pz3e7?tab=summary&timestamp=647.0)
  - [Potential start date: December 1st or 8th (possibly earlier if MSA exists)](https://fathom.video/share/sQPxLe3p5BiaMjqkEU-wjFPYdW6Pz3e7?tab=summary&timestamp=685.0)
  - [Action: Use upcoming call for deeper qualification, focus on editorial if possible](https://fathom.video/share/sQPxLe3p5BiaMjqkEU-wjFPYdW6Pz3e7?tab=summary&timestamp=834.0)

### Zapier Engagement

  - [Thousands of Zapier templates available to repurpose and optimize for SEO](https://fathom.video/share/sQPxLe3p5BiaMjqkEU-wjFPYdW6Pz3e7?tab=summary&timestamp=880.0)
  - [Kirkland heavily involved and confident in execution](https://fathom.video/share/sQPxLe3p5BiaMjqkEU-wjFPYdW6Pz3e7?tab=summary&timestamp=880.0)
  - [Scope includes template repurposing and potential new template creation](https://fathom.video/share/sQPxLe3p5BiaMjqkEU-wjFPYdW6Pz3e7?tab=summary&timestamp=880.0)
  - [Addresses Zapier's market share challenge against competitors like N8N](https://fathom.video/share/sQPxLe3p5BiaMjqkEU-wjFPYdW6Pz3e7?tab=summary&timestamp=924.0)
  - [Team views this as a well-scoped, manageable opportunity](https://fathom.video/share/sQPxLe3p5BiaMjqkEU-wjFPYdW6Pz3e7?tab=summary&timestamp=880.0)

### Reed AI Consideration

  - [CEO reached out directly to Marcel](https://fathom.video/share/sQPxLe3p5BiaMjqkEU-wjFPYdW6Pz3e7?tab=summary&timestamp=967.0)
  - [Decision: Decline termination for convenience clause](https://fathom.video/share/sQPxLe3p5BiaMjqkEU-wjFPYdW6Pz3e7?tab=summary&timestamp=967.0)
  - [Action: Tyler to politely decline using standard response](https://fathom.video/share/sQPxLe3p5BiaMjqkEU-wjFPYdW6Pz3e7?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

### Plus AI Opportunity

  - [Met through Madrona connection (venture capital firm)](https://fathom.video/share/sQPxLe3p5BiaMjqkEU-wjFPYdW6Pz3e7?tab=summary&timestamp=1174.0)

  - [Action: Post detailed requirements in DealDesk, discuss with Marcel in 1:1](https://fathom.video/share/sQPxLe3p5BiaMjqkEU-wjFPYdW6Pz3e7?tab=summary&timestamp=1517.0)

### Process Improvements

  - [Need for better qualification and scoping of programmatic use cases](https://fathom.video/share/sQPxLe3p5BiaMjqkEU-wjFPYdW6Pz3e7?tab=summary&timestamp=1441.0)

  - [Consideration of creating sample content refreshes or SEO audits to boost client confidence](https://fathom.video/share/sQPxLe3p5BiaMjqkEU-wjFPYdW6Pz3e7?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)
